stemHtml: Under operational procedures, when is a pilot considered to be acclimatised?

options.a: When the destination is located away from the home base in another country.
options.b: When the pilot has spent enough time at destination to be synchronized with the local climate.
options.c: When the circadian rhythm of the pilot is synchronised/adapted to the local time when away from home base.
options.d: When the pilot is provided rest facilities that meet regulatory requirements.
